channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Stablecoins earn while you earn: payroll balances finally yield inside wallets with no lockups. 💼💰 https://Blockchain.News/news/paxos-toku-yield-stablecoin-payroll #stablecoin #payroll #yield

item.title: Judge Kaplan nixes SBF’s bid for a new trial amid baseless claims. The 25-year sentence stands. 🧭 https://Blockchain.News/news/judge-rejects-sbf-new-trial-bid #FTX #CryptoNews #Law

item.title: AI agents will redraw banking roles—trust, permissions, governance—while machines push payments and contracts. Will banks stay gatekeepers or fade? 🏦🤖 https://Blockchain.News/news/ai-agentic-economy-banking #Banking #AI #Finance
item.description: AI agents will redraw banking roles—trust, permissions, governance—while machines push payments and contracts. Will banks stay gatekeepers or fade? 🏦🤖 https://Blockchain.News/news/ai-agentic-economy-banking #Banking #AI #Finance
